backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for Reeves Insurance Solutions backend, managing user profiles, quote submissions (with coverage/call-time types), business info, and admin access control via mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels — covering testimonial updates, hero headline changes, process proof section, and phone number replacements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, styling, and notable changes such as updated phone numbers, headlines, and testimonial attributions.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, Schema.org InsuranceAgency structured data for Reeves Insurance Solutions, and Google Fonts preconnect for Inter and Playfair Display.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router app defining a route tree with a public index route, an admin login route, and a protected admin layout route (with inline auth guard) containing nested dashboard, leads, appointments, and settings child routes.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the 'About Us' section with an agent headshot, credentials list, and core values, using IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAppoi: Displays a table of all appointment/quote submissions fetched via useGetAllAppointments, showing name, phone, coverage type, best time to call, and submission date.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard showing summary stat cards (total leads, quote submissions, this month, pending review) and a list of the 5 most recent quote submissions.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation, header with principal display, logout functionality via Internet Identity, and an Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeads: Renders a searchable table of all quote/lead submissions filtered by name, email, or phone, displaying contact details, coverage type, best time, zip code, and date.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Admin login page that authenticates via Internet Identity, redirecting to the admin dashboard on success and showing a loading spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Settings page allowing admins to view and inline-edit business info fields (name, phone, email, address, etc.) stored via useGetBusinessInfo and useUpdateBusinessInfo hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/Appointmen: A monthly calendar component that renders appointment submissions on their respective days, color-coded by coverage type, with previous/next month navigation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProtectedA: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the admin login page, showing a spinner while the identity is initializing and rendering child routes via Outlet when authenticated.
Interactive appointment booking component with a month calendar, time slot selection, a contact form, and a confirmation screen, backed by the useCalendarBooking hook.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact/quote request section displaying business contact details and a form (name, phone, email, zip, coverage type, best time to call) that submits via the useSubmitQuote mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: Dark forest-themed CTA section with a headline, three value-prop cards (No Obligation, 15-Minute Call, Family-First), and scroll-fade animations urging visitors to book a consultation.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that links to the business phone number via a tel: href, using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled wa.me chat link using the business WhatsApp number from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer including a carrier partner strip, brand info, quick links, coverage type links, contact details, licensed states, and social icons, preceded by the ProcessProofSection component.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, logo, desktop nav links, phone CTA, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated headline targeting Conroe insurance agents, trust-point checklist, stats row, and scroll-fade intersection animations.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonC: Displays a grid of four insurance coverage types (Auto, Home, Life, Business) with icons, descriptions, and 'Get Quote' links targeting the #quote anchor.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonF: Renders the site footer with a portfolio pitch banner, business contact info, service areas, and coverage types, followed by a ProcessProofSection component.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonH: Hero section for the Houston insurance landing page featuring a headline, trust badge, star rating, CTA buttons, and an agent portrait photo.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonQ: A quote request form collecting name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and preferred call time, submitting via the useHoustonQuoteSubmission hook and showing a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonT: Displays three customer testimonial cards with star ratings and a Google Reviews summary widget showing a 5.0 rating.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonW: Presents three value-proposition cards (Personal Service, Houston Expert, 24/7 Claims Help) with icons and descriptions explaining the independent broker advantage.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Section displaying the business address with a placeholder map area and instructions to replace it with a Google Maps embed.
frontend/src/components/ProcessProofSect: Three-step process section showing Figma design → live preview → Conroe #1 ranking, with screenshot cards and fallback placeholders on image error.
frontend/src/components/ReevesAboutSecti: About section featuring agent Johnathan Reeves' bio and an auto-advancing testimonial carousel with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCalendarSe: Scheduling section with a Calendly embed placeholder showing example embed code and a fallback direct-call CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCarrierBad: Displays a grid of four partnered insurance carrier badges (State Farm, Allstate, Geico, Progressive) with color-coded initials and A+ ratings, using an IntersectionObserver for a fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/ReevesContactSec: Renders a contact/quote request form with fields for name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and message, handling submission via the useReevesQuoteSubmission hook and showing success/error states.
frontend/src/components/ReevesFooter.tsx: Site footer displaying the business brand, licensing disclaimer, social media links, contact details, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice, pulling dynamic data from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the RIS logo, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a free-quote button, and a responsive mobile menu toggle, using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeroSectio: Full-screen hero section with a headline, subtext, CTA buttons for a free quote and scheduling a call, and trust-signal stats, with a fade-in animation on mount and dynamic data from useBusinessInfo.
frontend/src/components/ReevesServicesSe: Displays a grid of five insurance service cards (auto, home, life, health, business) with icons, descriptions, and highlights, animating cards into view sequentially via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/ReevesWhyChooseS: Displays a 'Why Choose Reeves Insurance Solutions' section with four animated cards (24/7 Support, Best Rates, Local Expert, A+ Carriers) that fade in on scroll using IntersectionObserver, styled with a dark blue gradient and gold accents.
Renders a grid of six insurance service cards (Auto, Home, Life, Business, Retirement, Umbrella) with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, each showing an icon, description, and benefit list.
frontend/src/components/StickyQuoteBar.t: A sticky top banner that appears after scrolling 300px, promoting a free insurance quote with a CTA link and a dismiss button that hides it permanently.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: An auto-advancing carousel displaying five client testimonials with star ratings, manual prev/next navigation, and scroll-triggered fade-in animations for the section header.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: A horizontal stats bar showing four trust metrics (30+ carriers, 500+ families, 4.9 rating, 15+ years) with icons and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Embeds a YouTube video in a styled responsive container with decorative corner accents, promoting AI-driven insurance advisory with a header that uses the business's city from a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays four differentiator cards (Independent, Education-First, Annual Reviews, Claims Support) on a dark forest background with gold accents and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching quote submissions (leads/appointments) and reading/writing business info stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessInfo.ts: Aggregates all business info fields from useGetBusinessInfo into a single object with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarBooking.ts: Provides time slot generation, availability checking, and a simulated appointment booking function for a calendar UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useHoustonQuoteSubmis: Mutation hook that submits a Houston-specific quote form to the backend actor and invalidates the quote submissions cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for user profile and quote submission CRUD operations against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReevesQuoteSubmiss: Mutation hook for the Reeves-branded quote form that maps string coverage types to backend enums before submitting.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an OKLCH-based design token system (forest green + amber gold palette), Tailwind imports, typography, and utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HoustonDemoPage.tsx: Page component that composes the Houston-themed landing page from hero, why-us, coverage, testimonials, quote form, and footer sections.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a full Privacy Policy page for Reeves Insurance Solutions with sections covering data collection, usage, and user rights. Includes a sticky header with navigation back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PublicSite.tsx: Assembles the main public-facing site by composing all section components (Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Contact, etc.) with a shared Header, Footer, and FloatingWhatsApp button.
frontend/src/pages/ReevesPublicSite.tsx: Assembles the Reeves Insurance Solutions branded public portfolio site using Reeves-specific section components, with floating action buttons (WhatsApp, Call) and a sticky quote bar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand color palettes (forest, amber, cream, charcoal, legacy Houston colors), typography font families, border radii, and box shadow utilities.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, required images, and a list of implemented features for the insurance lead generation/agent pitch platform.
